chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 31 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on CMA No.6626/25 (urgent) 2.For order on CMA No.6627/25 (u/o 21 rule 3) 3.For order on CMA No.1221/21 4.For hearing of CMA No.1222/21 5.For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Wajid Wyne, advocate for appellant Respondent Abdul Zubaid, present in person ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This application under Order 21 Rule 3 CPC has been filed jointly by counsel for appellant and respondent, who is also an Advocate and present in Court. The application is supported by affidavits of the appellant and the respondent recording the compromise entered into between the parties in this IInd Appeal. Given the compromise, this IInd Appeal is allowed in terms of compromise as recorded in the CMA No.6627 of 2027 and the judgment and decree may be prepared in terms of compromise thereof. Decreed, accordingly. J U D G E Ashraf
